_publications._publicationTitle: Genome-wide association study of café-au-lait macule number in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: the two most significant SNPs identified by EMMAX in RPS6KA2 intron on chromosome 6 (rs3799603 and rs12190451) also had the highest ComPaSS‐GWAS corroboration score (0.72)
details: Identified SNPs with corroboration scores of 0.72 for RPS6KA2 SNPs in CALM1 and 0.75 and 0.67 for ADCY2 SNPs in CALM2
